_comment: Static schema + ground truth for the Gate B browser fixtures. serve.ts reads this, starts the two servers on ephemeral ports, and writes manifest.runtime.json with baseUrl / crossOriginBaseUrl filled in. Markers are unique non-dictionary tokens so harness scoring is exact and fabrication is detectable. Markers tagged "renderOnly" are NOT present in served HTML source (base64-decoded at runtime) so a fetch-source grep can't shortcut the genuine interaction/render the task is meant to exercise.

groundTruth.absentField: there is NO phone number on this page
